name: Prune-only pl translate runs blocked by 13 pre-existing glossary violations (sesja/biblioteka/quiz/dyktando/seria locked terms)
description: Discovered during WI-621 PR #985 round 3 live-proof: the prune-only path of translate-gemini.ts validates the ENTIRE previous locale file, and pl.json carries 13 old glossary violations against locked terms (sesja, biblioteka, quiz, dyktando, seria). Any prune-only pl run fails on these pre-existing violations — independent of the keys being pruned. Either fix the 13 pl strings to honor the glossary, or scope prune-only validation to the keys being touched. Blocks/complicates WI-625 (WP-L12-pluralization) systematic pl passes. Evidence: PR #985 round-3 comment (live-proof section).
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: in scripts/translate-gemini.ts prune-only diff mode (removedKeys present, translateKeys empty) deletes removed keys from previousFlat, then validates the pruned locale against the full source/glossary, so unrelated pre-existing Polish glossary violations block the write; normal diff translation validates only the touched source keys. Variants: single behavioral variant confirmed - prune-only runs with removedKeys and no translateKeys; changed/missing-key diff runs must keep targeted validation. Regression test: extend scripts/translate-gemini tests with a fixture containing an unrelated old pl glossary violation plus one removed key; it fails before the fix and passes after either scoping prune-only validation to touched/removed keys or correcting the locked-term strings. Verify the fix does not weaken glossary enforcement for newly translated keys.
